description: A role bundles a set of atomic permissions that can be assigned to useraccounts.

id.description: Numeric identifier of the role (primary key in the role table). Omitted on create; set automatically by the database.

name.description: Unique technical name stored in the database (ASCII, e.g. agent_queue, appointment_admin).

description.description: German display label for administrators (stored in role.description).

assignedUserCount.description: Number of user accounts that have this role assigned (read-only, from API).

permissions.description: List of permission names that are granted by this role.
